moves.name: Burn
moves.content: Add the burn tag to your Clash attacks or weapons. Your attacks set things on fire and will add ongoing +1 damage if you roll a 12+ on your Clash.

moves.name: Intense
moves.content: Your fiery spirit manifests around you. You take 1 less damage from Clash results, but your intense personality gives you a -1 to Convince someone.

moves.name: Flaming sword
moves.content: You can manifest a fire sword (hand, sharp).

moves.name: Hot headed
moves.content: You lose your temper very easily and use that anger to drive you. You have a -1 to Persona rolls when you try to Keep your wits about you, but you have +2 to rolls involving people you have a competitive relationship with.

moves.name: Frost
moves.content: You also have access to ice-based affects and can cause people to move slowly. Add the retraining tag to your attacks.

moves.name: Flow
moves.content: You are easy to get along with and come across as agreeable. You have a +1 when trying to Convince someone, but your gentle nature also tends to make you a target.

moves.name: Water whip
moves.content: You can manifest a water whip (Close, wounding).

moves.name: Full support
moves.content: You live to support others and their endeavors. Targets in a cooperative relationship with you get a +2 to their rolls instead of the +1 they normally get during We can do it together.

moves.name: Buffeting
moves.content: Your mastery of the air allows you to add forceful to any attack action.

moves.name: Gliding
moves.content: Your control of the winds allows you to safely jump up and fall from heights.

moves.name: Air arrows
moves.content: You can manifest a bow and arrow of air (Far, wounding).

moves.name: One with air
moves.content: You can briefly turn yourself invisible, roughly for 30 seconds. If you use this to Thwart peril, you get a +1 to your roll.

moves.name: Solid
moves.content: Your affinity to rock makes you tougher and you take -1 damage.

moves.name: Grounded
moves.content: People view you as level headed and very trustworthy. If you can protect someone by telling them what to do through Convince someone, you can roll +Persona instead.

moves.name: Rock maul
moves.content: You can manifest a maul of solid rock (hand, sharp).

moves.name: Tough as rock
moves.content: You are hearty and can endure anything. You gain a plus +1 to Thwart peril checks that involve enduring pain or difficult environmental conditions.

moves.name: Fast
moves.content: The power of lightning has enhanced your reflexes and speed. You are able get to any location you can see without having to make a Thwart peril check.

moves.name: Static barrier
moves.content: You have an electrified aura around you. You always cause +1 damage when making a melee Clash check and cause 1 damage back to anything that hits you.

moves.name: Ball lightning
moves.content: You shoot a bolt of lightning from your body. (far, wounding).

moves.name: Quick thinking
moves.content: Gain an extra 1 hold on Be vigilant checks, even on a 6 or less.

moves.name: Sword
moves.content: Manifest a sword. (Hand, sharp)

moves.name: Shield
moves.content: Create shields of any size and shape. You gain a +1 to all Protect someone rolls.

moves.name: Unbending
moves.content: You are strong and rigid in your beliefs. You can choose to roll +Persona to Convince someone and if you succeed, you gain +1 to that roll.

moves.name: Tempered by fire
moves.content: You are hardier than most. You gain 2 health to your total health pool.

moves.name: Bright
moves.content: You can naturally create light, removing any setbacks imposed by darkness.

moves.name: Beacon
moves.content: Your inner light inspires people to do better. You gain +1 on all Touch their heart checks.

moves.name: Laser shot
moves.content: You can fire a beam of light as a laser (far, wounding).

moves.name: Radiant soul
moves.content: Your inner peace is palpable to others around you. You can spend 1 point from your power pool to upgrade your result on Touch their heart checks.

moves.name: See in the dark
moves.content: You can see naturally in the dark and at night with no restrictions.

moves.name: Manifest shadows
moves.content: You can create shadows at will. You gain +1 to a roll if you somehow use shadows as part of your solution.

moves.name: Dark dagger
moves.content: You can manifest a dagger of pure darkness (hand, sharp).

moves.name: Darkness within
moves.content: It is very hard for you to trust people. You sometimes feel unworthy of friendships, but value strongly those friendships you have. You get a +1 to all We can do this together actions; but if your relationship breaks, you gain the isolated condition.

moves.name: Healing touch
moves.content: Your mastery of life allows you to heal simple damage. You can heal 2 damage without rolling.

moves.name: Spontaneous growth
moves.content: Your connection to the living world allows you to cause plants to suddenly grow. You gain +1 to rolls when using plants in this way.

moves.name: Restraining vines
moves.content: You can manifest vines to manipulate targets (forceful, restraining).

moves.name: One world
moves.content: Your affinity to life helps you understand the connections between all living things. You only break your relationships if you roll a 4 or lower during the We can do this together action.

moves.name: Vampiric touch
moves.content: You can add life drain to your attacks. You heal back as many points as you inflict. Then roll +Persona. On a 10+, nothing happens. On a 7–9, you enjoy the taste of their life force and must continue attacking that target next turn. On a 6 or lower, you give into blood lust and will attack all people around you to sate your hunger.

moves.name: Doom
moves.content: Your grim nature is terrifying to others. You gain a +1 to Convince someone through intimidation but have a -1 to Convince someone if you attempt to charm them.

moves.name: Undead minion
moves.content: You can summon forth an undead minion to fight with you. They have +1 Physical, 3 health.

moves.name: Life lines
moves.content: Your connection to death allows you to see someone’s life thread. You can Glimpse the truth while touching someone, allowing you to witness events in their past.

moves.name: Palpable happiness
moves.content: Your connection to joy makes people love being around you. You can spend a Power Point to upgrade any Convince someone check that relies on charming them and not threatening them.

moves.name: Unending positivity
moves.content: People can’t help but feel good about themselves when near you. Any other heroes that are near you get a +1 to all Keep your wits checks.

moves.name: Happiness hammer
moves.content: You can manifest a large maul of joy (hand, forceful).

moves.name: Happy place
moves.content: You can manifest a bubble around yourself, another person, or item that gives them armor equal to your Persona rating.

moves.name: Deep understanding
moves.content: — Your connection with the harder moments in life makes you more in touch with other people’s motivations. You always have a +1 when you try to Touch their hearts.

moves.name: Heart piercer
moves.content: You can manifest a spear (close, wounding).

moves.name: Tears
moves.content: You have limited control over water. You can mold it and shape nearby sources of liquid that are no more than 5 gallons of fluid. You gain a +1 to checks when you creatively use water in the solution.

moves.name: Pensiveness
moves.content: You’re able to think clearly and deeply about any subject, even in stressful times. Gain a +1 to Glimpse the truth checks.

moves.name: Unconditional love
moves.content: You can roll +Emotional to remove a condition on yourself or another person. On a 10+, you clear that condition. On a 7–9, you transfer that condition from them to yourself. On a 6 or lower, you gain that condition without healing theirs.

moves.name: Healing hug
moves.content: You can always heal 2 damage without having to roll by simply touching the target.

moves.name: Cupid’s arrows
moves.content: You can manifest a bow and arrow (far, wounding).

moves.name: Feel the love
moves.content: You always gain a Power Point for yourself when you use We can do it, as long as you are both in a cooperative relationship with each other.

moves.name: Terrifying visage
moves.content: Your natural state is terrifying to others. You gain a +1 to Convince someone through intimidation but have a -1 to Convince someone if you attempt to charm them.

moves.name: Worst case scenario
moves.content: You understand everything that can go wrong. You can spend a Power Point to upgrade your result on all Be vigilant checks.

moves.name: Cold grip of fear
moves.content: You can encase your hands in ice allowing you to freeze people in place when you touch them (hand, restraining).

moves.name: Fight or flight
moves.content:
When you pick this option, choose one of the following:
  • Fight — You get a +1 to all Clash checks.
  • Flight — You get a +1 to all Thwart peril checks.

moves.name: Rage fueled attacks
moves.content: You can spend a Power Point to upgrade any Clash check.

moves.name: Burning spirit
moves.content: You can activate your anger to push past any pain. When making a Keep your wits check or Behind the 8 ball check, you can use +Physical instead.

moves.name: Flaming sword
moves.content: You can manifest a fire sword (hand, sharp).

moves.name: Bellowing roar
moves.content: You let out a terrifying scream. Normal people will automatically flee the area without having to make a check. Roll +Persona to affect underlings. On a 10+, all underlings will stop fighting and flee. On a 7–9, they are scared, and you gain +1 armor against these minions. On a 6 or less, everyone is afraid of you. All heroes have a -1 to all checks while you are in the area.

moves.name: Light at the end of the tunnel
moves.content: You can spend a Power Point to upgrade any Rest and relaxation checks and get a +1 when using Emotional in a We can do it check.

moves.name: Radiant soul
moves.content: Your inner peace is palpable to others around you. You can spend 1 point from your power pool to upgrade your result on Touch their heart checks.

moves.name: Beacon of hope
moves.content: You can manifest a bright beacon to fight alongside you. You can use it to blind your enemies in a Clash check (close, stunning).

moves.name: Everything will be fine
moves.content: You can always see the bright side of things which allows you a unique view into bad situations. You can use +Mystical for any Be vigilant checks.

moves.name: Irresistible
moves.content: You can evoke feelings of attraction in others. When you get a 10+ on a Convince someone check, always treat it as if you got a 12+.

moves.name: Wish fulfillment
moves.content: You have a deep connection to how people work and understand their wants. You can always ask “What do they desire?” when making a Glimpse the truth check, even on a 6 or less.

moves.name: Entangling whip
moves.content: You can manifest a whip for Clash attacks (close, restraining).

moves.name: Deep attachments
moves.content: Your connections to others is deep and meaningful. When you Protect another hero or NPC, you can use +Emotional for that check.

moves.name: That’s so gross
moves.content: You find almost everything disgusting and are experienced in avoiding it all. You can spend a Power Point to upgrade all Thwart peril checks.

moves.name: Slime armor
moves.content: You can manifest a layer of slime around yourself, giving you +1 armor.

moves.name: Acid spit
moves.content: You can shoot blobs of acid from your mouth as a weapon for Clash checks (far, wounding).

moves.name: Swarm of flies
moves.content: You can call forth a swarm of bugs to do your bidding. In combat, the swarm does 1 damage and has 3 health, and can move freely. It doesn’t need to be near you to be controlled. You can send your swarm to perform a simple task and roll +Mystical. On a 10+, your swarm completes the task successfully, and you can watch through its eyes and hear through its ears. On a 7–9, your familiar can complete the task, but the GM will offer you a hard choice, an extra cost, or the familiar attracts attention and danger.

moves.name: Do you trust me?
moves.content: People immediately like and trust your hero. You have the benefit of rolling a 7–9 on a Convince someone check if you rolled a 6 or less.

moves.name: I’ve got your back
moves.content: Your faith in others and others’ faith in you is unshakable. You can use +Persona on any We can do it together checks as your natural bond of support. However, if your relationship breaks, you gain the self-doubting condition as well.

moves.name: Firm foundation
moves.content: Your relationships are rock solid. You can spend a Power Point to upgrade your result on any Protect someone checks.

moves.name: Trust fall
moves.content: You are able to glide and fall from any distance without taking damage.
